results.resolved_title: Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae RTX-toxins: uniform designation of haemolysins, cytolysins, pleurotoxin and their genes.
results.quote: The genes of the apxI operon will have the designations apxIC, apxIA, apxIB, and apxID for the activator, the structural gene and the two secretion genes respectively.
results.note: Frey 1993 nomenclature paper on A. pleuropneumoniae RTX-toxins; apxIA is the structural gene, secreted via apxIB/apxID (T1SS). Paper is positively about this organism.

results.resolved_title: Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae RTX-toxins: uniform designation of haemolysins, cytolysins, pleurotoxin and their genes.
results.note: Paper is a single-organism nomenclature/review of Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae RTX-toxins (title/abstract/MeSH all A. pleuropneumoniae only). It makes no claim about Achromobacter agilis; cited as homolog source for a different organism.
